TEXT.id: Wiki_Sakizaya_Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論
TEXT.source: Sakizaya Wikipedia, article: Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論
TEXT.citation: Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]. https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論, title = Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dowmung_mabaluduh_pasayda_i_niyadu’_nuudip_anidatengan_a_dadan!_Patahekl_tu_cacay_a_bataan_nu_sasakamuen_amatatengilDowmung(銅門)積極邁向部落自主之路！提10議題討論} }

S.FORM: kakaliman:sakay niyadu'an a binacadan nu tatatengilan a kawaw, siwlingu Dowmung a niyadu' itini i enemay a demiad tu labii saka tusa nu niyadu' anipilubungan, misuayaw tu micalilaway nu niyadu'ay a tademaw nu tatengilan a kawaw milihida a matatengil. Dowmung 部落在6 .
S.PHON: kakar~ɾiman:sakaj nijaduʔ~ʡan a binaʦadan nu tatatəŋir~ɾan a kawaw, siwr~ɾiŋu dowmuŋ a nijaduʔ~ʡ itini i ənəmaj a dəmiad tu r~ɾabii saka tusa nu nijaduʔ~ʡ anipir~ɾubuŋan, misuajaw tu miʦar~ɾir~ɾawaj nu nijaduʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw nu tatəŋir~ɾan a kawaw mir~ɾiħida a matatəŋir~ɾ. dowmuŋ **** .
S.FORM: kakaliman:sakay niyadu'an a binacadan nu tatatengilan a kawaw, siwlingu Dowmung a niyadu' itini i enemay a demiad tu labii saka tusa nu niyadu' anipilubungan, misuayaw tu micalilaway nu niyadu'ay a tademaw nu tatengilan a kawaw milihida a matatengil. Dowmung 部落在6 .
S.PHON: kakar~ɾiman:sakaj nijaduʔ~ʡan a binaʦadan nu tatatəŋir~ɾan a kawaw, siwr~ɾiŋu dowmuŋ a nijaduʔ~ʡ itini i ənəmaj a dəmiad tu r~ɾabii saka tusa nu nijaduʔ~ʡ anipir~ɾubuŋan, misuajaw tu miʦar~ɾir~ɾawaj nu nijaduʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw nu tatəŋir~ɾan a kawaw mir~ɾiħida a matatəŋir~ɾ. dowmuŋ **** .
